_note: Real numbers from prod dist (seed-title-baselines run 25381905225, deploy 25377776239). job-board accounts for 99.6% of offenders by design — JOB_TITLE_MAX=70 in build-plugins/jobsSeoPagesPlugin.ts preserves the city-preserving structure (job title + company + city + (#hash) disambiguator) inside a 70-char cap, which exceeds the audit threshold of 66 by up to 4 char on every job page. Non-job buckets stayed near zero — the drop-brand fix in build-plugins/shared/titleSuffix.ts:buildTitleWithBrand caught nearly everything else. Counts can only go DOWN; rebaseline via the seed-title-baselines workflow after a deliberate improvement.
